purpose: Business charts must use the business-chart contract; researched BarChart usage is allowed when required props and accessibility are present.
fallback_policy: Use fallback only for chart types without local official docs or contracts.
Fallback charts must expose exact data in an accessible table.
Fallback charts must include data source, last updated time, and empty/error states.
visual_policy: Use brand or data visualization tokens for primary series.
Threshold lines require label, unit, and source.
Legend may be hidden only when one series is present and the heading labels the metric.
